---
id: create-your-own
title: Create Your Own Template
sidebar_position: 6
---

# Create Your Own Template

You can create a custom template for any language or framework. Templates are plain directories of Handlebars (`.hbs`) files.

## Template structure

```
my-template/
├── template.json
├── model.hbs
└── service.hbs
```

## Step 1 — Write `template.json`

```json
{
  "name": "my-template",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "language": "kotlin",
  "description": "Kotlin data classes + Exposed ORM",
  "author": "your-handle",
  "files": [
    {
      "template": "model.hbs",
      "output": "{{PascalCase name}}.kt",
      "per": "table"
    },
    {
      "template": "service.hbs",
      "output": "{{PascalCase name}}Service.kt",
      "per": "table"
    }
  ]
}
```

## Step 2 — Write your `.hbs` files

Use any [built-in helper](/templates/overview#built-in-handlebars-helpers) and standard Handlebars constructs:

```handlebars
// Auto-generated by Daxonne — do not edit manually

data class {{PascalCase name}}(
{{#each columns}}
    val {{CamelCase name}}: {{CSharpType type}}{{#if nullable}}?{{/if}}{{#unless @last}},{{/unless}}
{{/each}}
)
```

### Useful Handlebars patterns

**Iterate columns:**
```handlebars
{{#each columns}}
  {{name}} — {{type}} — nullable: {{nullable}}
{{/each}}
```

**Conditional on nullability:**
```handlebars
{{#if nullable}}?{{/if}}
{{#unless nullable}}, nullable=False{{/unless}}
```

**First/last detection:**
```handlebars
{{#unless @last}},{{/unless}}
```

**Check if primary key:**
```handlebars
{{#if isPrimary}}@Id{{/if}}
```

**Iterate foreign keys:**
```handlebars
{{#each foreignKeys}}
  {{column}} → {{referencedTable}}.{{referencedColumn}}
{{/each}}
```

## Step 3 — Install locally

Place your template directory in `.daxonne/templates/my-template/` and add it to `daxonne.yaml`:

```yaml
templates:
  - my-template
```

Then run:

```bash
daxonne generate
```

## Step 4 — Share it (optional)

To add your template to the official registry:

1. Fork [github.com/Daxonne/templates](https://github.com/Daxonne/templates)
2. Add your template directory
3. Add an entry to `registry.json`:
   ```json
   {
     "name": "my-template",
     "version": "1.0.0",
     "language": "kotlin",
     "description": "Kotlin data classes + Exposed ORM"
   }
   ```
4. Open a pull request

## Available data in templates

### Table-level context (`per: "table"`)

| Key | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `name` | string | Table name (original case from DB) |
| `columns` | array | All columns |
| `columns[].name` | string | Column name |
| `columns[].type` | string | Internal type (`string`, `int`, `long`, `decimal`, `bool`, `date`, `datetime`, `bytes`, `uuid`) |
| `columns[].nullable` | bool | Whether the column accepts NULL |
| `columns[].isPrimary` | bool | Whether the column is part of the primary key |
| `primaryKeys` | array of strings | Primary key column names |
| `foreignKeys` | array | Foreign key constraints |
| `foreignKeys[].column` | string | FK column name |
| `foreignKeys[].referencedTable` | string | Referenced table |
| `foreignKeys[].referencedColumn` | string | Referenced column |

### Schema-level context (`per: "schema"`)

| Key | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `tables` | array | All tables (same structure as table-level context) |
